taxon.author: Shear & Benoit,
taxon.distribution: Egypt, Ethiopia, Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda. Introduced to Denmark, Netherlands, Belgium

referenceObject.reference: Shear, W. A. & Benoit, P. L. G. (1974). New species and new records in the genus Oecobius Lucas from Africa and nearby islands (Araneae: Oecobiidae: Oecobiinae). Revue Zoologique Africaine 88: 706-720.
